contexts.context: ...me of reading the letters written to me by <mark>Malle</mark>. Sack, from Berlin, concerning my voyage...
...when he paced so fruitlessly up and down the <mark>Mall</mark>, gazing with expectation at every lady he met...
...a subscription at Messrs. Ransoms',32 Pall <mark>Mall</mark> East, on behalf of the Smollett of France...
